scripts.test:runtime: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; RPC=http://127.0.0.1:8899; WALLET=/home/geraltritama33/.config/solana/id.json; solana-test-validator --reset --quiet >/tmp/solana-test-validator.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; trap "kill $pid >/dev/null 2>&1 || true" EXIT; for i in {1..40}; do solana cluster-version --url $RPC >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 1; done; solana cluster-version --url $RPC >/dev/null 2>&1; ANCHOR_PROVIDER_URL=$RPC anchor build >/dev/null; ANCHOR_PROVIDER_URL=$RPC anchor program deploy --provider.cluster localnet >/dev/null; ANCHOR_PROVIDER_URL=$RPC ANCHOR_WALLET=$WALLET yarn exec ts-mocha -p tsconfig.json "tests/crowdfunding.ts"'
